mission.title: ko: RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static
mission.description: RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check ko installation
steps.description:
Verify your ko installation:
```bash
ko version
```
Install if needed: `go install github.com/google/ko@latest` or `brew install ko`. ko builds Go container images without Docker.

steps.title: Review the issue context
steps.description: The current default base image is `gcr.io/distroless/static:nonroot`, which we switched two about 2 years ago in https://github.com/google/ko/issues/160 (from the non-`nonroot` variant).

steps.title: Apply the fix for RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static
steps.description:
Tested:

- if `.ko.yaml` is empty or non-existent --> warning
- if `.ko.yaml` specifies any `defaultBaseImage` --> no warning
- if `.ko.yaml` specifies `baseImageOverrides` matching all requested builds --> no warning

Progress toward #722 

---

```
➜  ko git:(default-base-image-warning) go run ./
```yaml
$ crane manifest gcr.io/distroless/static:nonroot --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec
786K

$ crane manifest ghcr.io/distroless/static --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec
129K
```

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description:
Test that the fix is working as expected:
```bash
ko version
```
Confirm the feature described in "RFC: Switch default base image to ghcr.io/distroless/static" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Tested:

- if `.ko.yaml` is empty or non-existent --> warning
- if `.ko.yaml` specifies any `defaultBaseImage` --> no warning
- if `.ko.yaml` specifies `baseImageOverrides` matching all requested builds --> no warning

Progress toward #722 

---

```
➜  ko git:(default-base-image-warning) go run ./ build ./ 
2022/06/21 13:20:30 Using base
codeSnippets:
$ crane manifest gcr.io/distroless/static:nonroot --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec
786K

$ crane manifest ghcr.io/distroless/static --platform=linux/amd64 | jq '.config.size + ([.layers[].size] | add)' | numfmt --to=iec
129K

prerequisites.description: Go 1.21+ and ko installed. ko is a CLI tool for building Go container images, not a Kubernetes workload.
